# Chapter 11: Manufacturing-driven materials properties  (~110 pp)
- 11.1 Why how it was made matters as much as what it is (15) · 11.2 Forging, casting, rolling: residual stresses (15) · 11.3 Heat-affected zone in welding (12) · 11.4 Surface treatments: case hardening, shot peening, anodising (15) · 11.5 Additive manufacturing: anisotropy, porosity, residual stress (18) · 11.6 Quality control: NDT methods (15) · 11.7 Failure section: as-manufactured vs as-designed: when the gap killed people (20)

**Archetype**: scaling, failure. **Project**: characterise the property variation in an additively manufactured sample (anisotropy, density). **Exercises**: 30.
